decisions.decision: Fix all 26 confirmed findings from deep workflow audit in 4 phases, ordered by severity and dependency
decisions.rationale: Phased approach keeps each plan at max 3 tasks and lets us ship incrementally with verification at each stage

decisions.decision: Phase 1 fixes runtime bugs: venv path inconsistency (workflow_memory.py lines 73-74 use .venv, should be .cnogo/.venv), quick SUMMARY.json validation gap, team.md epic_id derivation
decisions.rationale: These affect correctness at runtime — venv mismatch can cause graph features to silently fail

decisions.decision: Phase 2 aligns standards: unify severity scales to Critical/Warning/Info across all skills, add 2 missing principles to root CLAUDE.md, consolidate perf-analysis.md into performance-review.md
decisions.rationale: Inconsistent severity scales make review findings hard to compare; missing principles create a gap between policy documents

decisions.decision: Phase 3 normalizes commands: standardize step headings to '### Step N:', add validate step to tdd.md, convert ship.md to Step format, add branch cleanup to plan/implement/ship, fix implementer agent git add -A
decisions.rationale: Consistency across commands reduces cognitive load and prevents parsing fragility if tooling consumes these

decisions.decision: Phase 4 addresses documentation and low-priority items: ROADMAP graph coverage, missing renderers, dead code cleanup, WORKFLOW.json graph config, secret redaction patterns, missing commands/skills
decisions.rationale: Lower urgency — documentation gaps and nice-to-haves that don't affect runtime behavior

decisions.decision: Drop original HIGH #2 (bare except in validation) — investigation shows all exceptions are properly caught with error reporting
decisions.rationale: Agent verified workflow_validate_core.py properly catches and logs exceptions — no bare except: pass exists

constraints: Each phase should be independently shippable
Must not break existing tests or workflow validation
Skill changes must preserve the 7-axis scoring rubric interface
Command heading changes must be consistent across all 29 command files
